## Heavy Put Activity in GDS Holdings Puts Undervaluation Case in Question

Elevated put activity in a China-exposed data center name is a risk flag for the China AI infrastructure thesis; if the GDS undervaluation argument is eroding, it may reflect broader skepticism on China data center demand materializing on the timeline the thesis requires.

- Options market is showing heavy put interest in GDS Holdings.
- Analysis questions whether the undervalued thesis for GDS remains intact given current conditions.
- China data center expansion thesis faces incremental bearish pressure from derivatives positioning.
- No specific figures or valuation metrics cited in the headline; directional read is negative.
